root_text.an5.197:1.1: “Pañcime, bhikkhave, vassassa antarāyā, yaṁ nemittā na jānanti, yattha nemittānaṁ cakkhu na kamati.
root_text.an5.197:1.5: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, paṭhamo vassassa antarāyo, yaṁ nemittā na jānanti, yattha nemittānaṁ cakkhu na kamati.
root_text.an5.197:2.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, upari ākāse vāyodhātu pakuppati.
root_text.an5.197:2.3: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, dutiyo vassassa antarāyo, yaṁ nemittā na jānanti, yattha nemittānaṁ cakkhu na kamati.
root_text.an5.197:3.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rāhu asurindo pāṇinā udakaṁ sampaṭicchitvā mahāsamudde chaḍḍeti.
root_text.an5.197:3.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, tatiyo vassassa antarāyo, yaṁ nemittā na jānanti, yattha nemittānaṁ cakkhu na kamati.
root_text.an5.197:4.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, vassavalāhakā devā pamattā honti.
root_text.an5.197:4.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, catuttho vassassa antarāyo, yaṁ nemittā na jānanti, yattha nemittānaṁ cakkhu na kamati.
root_text.an5.197:5.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, manussā adhammikā honti.
root_text.an5.197:5.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, pañcamo vassassa antarāyo, yaṁ nemittā na jānanti, yattha nemittānaṁ cakkhu na kamati.
root_text.an5.197:5.3: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca vassassa antarāyā, yaṁ nemittā na jānanti, yattha nemittānaṁ cakkhu na kamatī”ti.

translation_text.an5.197:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five obstacles to rain, which the forecasters don’t know, and which their vision does not traverse.
translation_text.an5.197:1.3: In the upper atmosphere the fire element flares up,
translation_text.an5.197:1.5: This is the first obstacle to rain, which the forecasters don’t know, and which their vision does not traverse.
translation_text.an5.197:2.1: Furthermore, in the upper atmosphere the air element flares up,
translation_text.an5.197:2.3: This is the second obstacle to rain …
translation_text.an5.197:3.1: Furthermore, Rāhu, lord of titans, receives water in his hand and discards it in the ocean.
translation_text.an5.197:3.2: This is the third obstacle to rain …
translation_text.an5.197:4.1: Furthermore, the gods of the rain clouds become negligent.
translation_text.an5.197:4.2: This is the fourth obstacle to rain …
translation_text.an5.197:5.2: This is the fifth obstacle to rain, which the forecasters don’t know, and which their vision does not traverse.
translation_text.an5.197:5.3: These are the five obstacles to rain, which the forecasters don’t know, and which their vision does not traverse.”
